description_long: This cabinetry unit features a modern, compact L-shaped design with a combination of light wood, white, and dark gray finishes. The front section includes a marble-like countertop with a glass panel, likely serving as a breakfast bar or divider. The main cabinetry area incorporates upper and lower cabinets, drawers, and open shelving, providing ample storage and workspace. A tall, dark gray section on one side appears to function as a pantry or integrated appliance housing. The cabinetry is accented with sleek, vertical bar pulls and minimalist hardware, contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a blend of engineered wood, laminate, and metal components, suitable for urban kitchens or compact living spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped cabinetry unit with light wood, white, and dark gray finishes, featuring a marble countertop, glass panel, and sleek bar pulls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marble countertop, glass panel, and main cabinetry with visible sink and storage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the L-shape, open shelving, and tall dark gray pantry or appliance section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wood paneling and the side of the tall dark gray section.
description_view_3: Back view with continuous wood paneling and a partial view of the countertop edge.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen base and wall cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, and open shelf
